prompt_text:
### Demographics: 79-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Rheumatoid Arthritis
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Insulin Glargine 20units once daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 98.8 kg; Height 181.5 cm; BMI 30.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 139/82 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 11.7%; 9 months ago 12.0%; 6 months ago 12.0%; 3 months ago 11.5%; current 10.3%), FPG (12 months ago 260mg/dL; 9 months ago 320mg/dL; 6 months ago 293mg/dL; 3 months ago 306mg/dL; current 269mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 98.8kg; 9 months ago 98.7kg; 6 months ago 94.2kg; 3 months ago 99.4kg; current 98.8kg), Height (12 months ago 181.5cm; 9 months ago 181.5cm; 6 months ago 181.5cm; 3 months ago 181.5cm; current 181.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 30.0kg/m²; current 30.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 137mmHg; 9 months ago 140mmHg; 6 months ago 142mmHg; 3 months ago 142mmHg; current 139mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 80mmHg; 9 months ago 81mmHg; 6 months ago 80mmHg; 3 months ago 82mmHg; current 82mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 19U/L; 9 months ago 11U/L; 6 months ago 13U/L; 3 months ago 11U/L; current 14U/L), AST (12 months ago 17U/L; 9 months ago 16U/L; 6 months ago 23U/L; 3 months ago 18U/L; current 19U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 17mL/min/1.73m²; current 18mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 543mg/g; 9 months ago 587mg/g; 6 months ago 459mg/g; 3 months ago 699mg/g; current 588mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 91mg/dL; 9 months ago 86mg/dL; 6 months ago 85mg/dL; 3 months ago 83mg/dL; current 87mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 50mg/dL; 6 months ago 53mg/dL; 3 months ago 53mg/dL; current 52mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 172mg/dL; 9 months ago 178mg/dL; 6 months ago 174mg/dL; 3 months ago 176mg/dL; current 166mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.2g/dL; 3 months ago 12.9g/dL; current 11.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.68 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
